# DENTIST FLOWER MOUND TX

# Fountain Park Dental

# Your Oasis For Dental Care

Welcome to Fountain Park Dental in Flower Mound TX, where your smile is our priority. Our mission is to offer exemplary care that is more than just a treatment – it’s about fostering long-lasting, confident smiles. Experience compassionate dentistry designed around your comfort and well-being. Let our [Flower Mound TX dentist](https://www.fountainparkdental.com/), Dr. Girish Chaudhari guide you on a journey toward improved oral health with personalized care every step of the way. Together, we’ll work towards brighter, healthier smiles for years to come. We invite you to visit our dental office for all your dental needs.

![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Affiliated-Logos-White.webp)

## Fountain Park Dental is now accepting new patients. We would love to connect!

[Schedule Your Visit](https://mychart.myoryx.com/patient/#/auth/onlineschedule?realm=fountainparkdental&univers=com)

[Special Offers](https://fountainparkdental.com/special/)

[Testimonials](https://fountainparkdental.com/testimonials/)

## We Serve With Integrity and Care

![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Dentist-Flower-Mound-TX-Best-Dentist-Award.webp)

- Privately Owned

Our dental practice is owned and led by an exceptional dentist, Dr. Chaudhari. You’ll see him at every single appointment, and he’ll treat you like a member of his extended family.

- Timely & Quality Service

We understand you have other places to be, so we’ll work efficiently during your visits, but we’ll never rush. We’ll do things right the first time, every time.

- High-Tech Facility

If there is an instrument that will make the preventive, restorative, or cosmetic dentistry you need gentler, faster, or more precise, then you can trust we already have it.

[![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Invisalign.avif)](https://fountainparkdental.com/invisalign/)

## What We Offer

### Convenient Appointments

Convenient dental appointments make it easy to prioritize your oral health with flexible scheduling options that fit seamlessly into your busy life.

### Personalized Care

Personalized dental care tailors treatments to each patient's unique needs and goals, ensuring a more comfortable and effective path to optimal oral health.

### Full Price Transparency

We present all costs upfront and you and your dentist (not insurance companies) can decide what's best for you. Costs are HSA and FSA eligible.

## What to Expect

# Advanced Dental Technology

- **CBCT:** Creates a 3D map of all of your dental anatomy in a single image.
- **Intraoral scanner & camera:** Captures clear, in-depth images of your mouth
- **Digital X-rays:** Faster, safer, and clearer.
- **Digital Smile Design:** Shows how your smile will look before starting treatment!
- **Laser Technology:** Disinfects and decontaminates bacteria at a microscopic level.

[Discover Our Technology](https://fountainparkdental.com/advanced-dental-technology-2/)

Patient Comforts

Experience top-tier comfort while our dedicated dentist looks after your smile.

- Relax with a beverage from our station.
- Enjoy your favorite shows on TVs in patient rooms.
- Dive into your favorite TV show on Netflix.
- Sit back and relax with calming music.

Conditions We Help

**1\. Dental Caries** commonly known as ‘cavities,” is the most common oral health condition affecting teeth. According to CDC all adults have at least one cavity during their lifetime.

**2\. Gum Disease,** also known as periodontal disease affects the supporting structure around teeth and it is the number one reason for a tooth loss in adults.

**3\. Missing teeth/ Tooth Loss** due to caries, gum diseases or trauma.

**4\. Misalignment of teeth** in the form of crowding, overbite, cross bite and underbite affects teeth in many ways other than esthetics. It makes teeth more prone to getting caries, gum disease, premature wear of teeth and even jaw pain.

**5\. Cracked/Chipped teeth** – This could happen due to grinding or clenching of teeth, uneven bite or direct trauma to teeth.

**6\. Oral cancer** in mouth can occur on lips, tongue, lining of cheek and gums, roof of mouth and under the tongue or floor of the mouth. Routine dental check-ups play a crucial role in the early detection of oral cancer, helping to save many lives each year.

**7\. Teeth sensitivity** is discomfort or pain in teeth with cold, hot or acidic foods. This can happen due to tooth wear, cavity, crack/fracture of tooth or gum recession.

**8\. Bad breath,** or halitosis, can result from several factors such as poor oral hygiene, dry mouth, underlying health issues, or certain foods. Maintaining good oral hygiene—like brushing, flossing, and cleaning your tongue regularly—plays a crucial role in preventing and managing bad breath.

Services We Offer

**1\. Preventive Care –** At Fountain Park Dental, we believe in ‘Prevention is better than cure.’ Regular dental check-ups are a key part of this philosophy. By scheduling routine visits to the dentist, we can catch potential issues early, preventing the development of more serious dental problems. Early intervention helps maintain your oral health and saves you from more invasive and costly treatments down the line. We strongly encourage making dental check-ups a regular part of your healthcare routine to ensure the best possible outcomes.

**2\. Cosmetic dentistry –** We offer a wide range of solutions to help you achieve the smile you’ve always wanted. Whether you’re looking to straighten your teeth with proper alignment, brighten your smile with professional whitening, enhance your teeth with custom dental veneers, repair imperfections with bonding, or replace missing teeth with natural-looking restorations, we have treatments tailored to meet your needs. Our goal is to provide comprehensive care that boosts both your confidence and your oral health.

**3\. Invisalign –** Achieving a straight smile has never been simpler. Clear plastic aligners offers the benefits of traditional braces without the metal brackets and wires. Paired with advanced 3D software, this innovative technology makes it easier than ever for adults and teens to transform their smiles discreetly and effectively.

**4\. Dental implants** are a highly effective, long-term solution for replacing missing or non-salvageable teeth. Unlike traditional dentures or bridges, implants provide a stable, natural-looking result by mimicking the structure of your natural tooth.

**5\. Emergency care –** Dental emergencies can happen at any time, and when they do, we’re here to help. Whether you’re dealing with a sudden toothache, a fractured or knocked-out tooth, an abscess, or a dental infection, we understand how stressful and painful these situations can be. That’s why we offer same-day appointments to ensure you receive prompt care when you need it the most.

**6\. Night guards and athletic mouthguard –** We offer a range of protective dental solutions, including night guards and athletic mouthguards, designed to safeguard your teeth and oral health in different situations. Whether you’re dealing with teeth grinding (bruxism) or playing sports, these custom-made guards can help prevent significant damage and long-term oral health issues.

**7\. Root Canals**

**8\. Wisdom teeth extraction**

## Dental Insurance and In-House Plan

### I Have Dental Insurance

Our dentist is in-network with a majority of dental insurance plans, and our team are experts at maximizing benefits to lower your out-of-pocket costs.

[Find Your Dental Insurance](https://fountainparkdental.com/patient-information/)

### I Don't Have Dental Insurance

You don’t need insurance to access affordable dentistry. Our plan allows you to save at every visit on essential services.

[See Plan Details](https://fountainparkdental.com/savings-plan/)

![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Dentist-Flower-Mound-TX-Front-Desk-Meeting-With-Patient-HP.webp)

# Flower Mound's Most Attentive Dentist

# Meet Dr. Girish Chaudhari

![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Dentist-Flower-Mound-TX-Dr-Girish-Chaudhari-Signature.webp)

Dr. Chaudhari chose to run his own dental office in Flower Mound TX because he values truly getting to know his patients beyond their teeth in order to build relationships that lead to easier appointments and better results. After earning his first dental degree in India, he went on to graduate from the University of Colorado School of Dental Medicine as well as earn a master’s in public health from UNT. Committed to providing his patients with the absolute best, he underwent advanced training on laser treatment, Invisalign, and dental implants as well. Now, he has been helping patients in Flower Mound TX smile for over a decade!

[Meet the Team](https://fountainparkdental.com/us/)

![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Dentist-Flower-Mound-TX-Girish-Chaudhari-Standing-At-Front-Desk-HP.webp)

## Girish Chaudhari, DDS

## Would you believe seeing your dentist could   actually feel this good and be easy?

![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Dentist-Flower-Mound-TX-Fountain-Park-Dental-Logo-on-Front-Entrance-Window.webp)

![](https://fountainparkdental.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/We-Promise-It-Can-Dental.png)

At Fountain Park Dental, we spend time analyzing & taking measurements on your x-rays before formulating a plan.  We will share and explain what we’ve found with you. It’s your teeth. It’s your health. We want to help you meet all your smile goals in Flower Mound TX.

### Conveniently Located Near You

Whether you’re visiting our dentist for a routine checkup, gum disease treatment, dentures, or one of the smile-enhancing services we offer, like veneers, we look forward to welcoming you to our office! You’ll find us at the southern end of Fountain Park basically next door to Moviehouse & Eatery by Cinépolis. We’re just off of Long Prairie Rd between Spinks Rd and Lakeside Pkwy.

data.summary: Fountain Park Dental, located in Flower Mound, TX, offers comprehensive dental care with a focus on exemplary service and patient comfort. The practice is led by Dr. Girish Chaudhari and accepts new patients, emphasizing personalized care and advanced technology. Services include preventive care, cosmetic dentistry, Invisalign, dental implants, emergency care, and more. The clinic is now open on alternating Saturdays and provides flexible scheduling options to accommodate patients' needs. They also offer an in-house dental savings plan for those without insurance. Fountain Park Dental is dedicated to promoting long-lasting oral health and confident smiles.
